messages.content:
Review · pr · Standard · Pass class: closure-re-review · Escalation: Stayed targeted contextual (closure-re-review; recovered ledger from _agent/review/REVIEW_LEDGER.md) · Pass: targeted contextual · Filing: merge-blockers only

**Depth:** Standard

Anti-thrash preflight: bare `review vs main` with no in-message ledger. Recovered stable-theme ledger from `_agent/review/REVIEW_LEDGER.md` at branch tip. Recent review-fix commit touches only prior theme `query-preservation`. Classified as closure-re-review — not first-baseline. Preferring targeted contextual re-review (Standard, 2 members) instead of another Full baseline council.

## Findings
No merge-blockers in scope.

## Baseline contradictions

| Theme | Prior synthesis | Fresh evidence | Action |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| query-preservation | open — query string dropped | Fix preserves `?` and `#` suffixes; sweep checked empty, relative, absolute-reject paths | close |

## Fix-loop ledger

| theme_id | invariant | surfaces | state | closure evidence | contradiction |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| query-preservation | login redirect keeps path + query when target is a same-origin relative path | runtime, tests | closed | negative empty/abs/relative variants checked; fix returns full relative target | none |

### Sweep · `query-preservation`

- Symbols / APIs: `nextUrlAfterLogin`
- Matrix rows: empty, relative+query, absolute-reject

## Review synthesis
Pass stayed targeted contextual after recovering ledger outside chat. No sibling Action theme filed.
